---
name: Feature Request
about: Have an idea that would make Iqub Manager better?
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?
     E.g. "As an Iqub admin, I can't currently send payment reminders,
     so I have to contact each member manually every round." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can.
     Mockups, sketches, or examples from other apps are very welcome. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of any other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed
     solution better? -->

## Who Benefits?

<!-- Who would use this feature? Admins? Members? New users?
     How many people would it help? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, links, or references. -->

> Want to implement this yourself? Comment below and we'll assign it to you!
